title: × androrhiza atacina
intro: × Androrhiza atacina is a rare and endangered plant species, also known as the "Atacina" or "Slipper Orchid," which belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the × Androrhiza atacina plant are typically dried and processed into teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal use.
